storyInfo: Faced with her past and the Feranmut crisis before her, Ch'en refuses to stay uninvolved. The Grand Tutor's sudden visit deepens the wedge between Ch'en and Wei Yenwu, and Ch'en leaves unhappy. When she returns, Wei Yenwu has vanished without a trace.

attributes.text: 'Remember this family name. The rest has nothing to do with you.'
'I hate you. And I hate them. I should love you, but right now I hate every last one of you.'
'When you grow up... you'll change everything.'

attributes.content: <p=2>Three days before the day of the full moon</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: ...Thunder.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: And nothing more.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: It's late autumn. If you wait till winter, the roads will be hard to traverse.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: ...Hmph.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hui-chieh... you should go back.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: 'Go back'?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: To where? Lungmen?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I've already told you what you want to know.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: So you should understand, all that lies in front of you is none of your business.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Hah... I think you've gotten old, Uncle.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If you were five years younger, we would have crossed swords already.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Your temperament has changed too.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: You don’t have many issues here, over the past few days at this posthouse.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Because I still don't trust you.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What you said... about the Grand Preceptor, about your brother—that 'other uncle' I've never met, and the old True Lung...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: It's not my place to comment, but if I have to say something, I'm just glad you're not the one running Yan.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I cannot argue with that...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I really do want to know what was going on in your head when you left Baizao, why Mother followed you to Lungmen, and why she stayed.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: But at this point, I'm not expecting to hear a fair answer—or an objective account of the past from you.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: So I'll find the answers myself—and I'm not leaving until I do.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You have a knack for messing things up when it matters most, especially when it's about you.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: To stop you from doing anything stupid again, or even just to keep you safe—I'm not leaving until I'm done.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: So let's both save our breath.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hui-chieh... these past few years, you—
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Same as always. Nothing worth sharing.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Perhaps it's better to wait until you're willing...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Ch'en Hui-chieh looks out the window.
The lights of the far-off nomadic city have been dim for days, leaving Baizao's skyline vague at night, like the spine of a Feranmut in hiding.
She tries to imagine the colossal creatures from ancient fables only recently confirmed as real to her.
Fine autumn rain drizzles against the window, like pins and needles on glass.
Still no news.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Then that's the best news we could ask for.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: There is no hoping for a positive turn of events, at this point.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: So, if anything strange happens in Baizao... Yumen won't hesitate to go to war.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: This 'bestial Sui' you talk of, the unrest it might cause, and any battle it might provoke... no one's sure how any of it could turn out.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Correct.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: So this is the secret Great Yan has hidden for over a thousand years... You two are so alike.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: There is a strange detail, though.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Time is running out, but in the past ten days, there have been no more than three Messenger parties traveling between Yumen and Baizao.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: When Yumen is facing war, we would expect far more traffic.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Lord Wei, a visitor.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: At a time like this...?
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Send them in.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I trust you've been well, Lord Wei.
Likewise, Grand Tutor.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: So you're... the Grand Tutor of Yan?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I did not know Lady Ch'en would be here as well.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: How do you...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en is certain she has never met this old man before.
She cannot tell if it is an austere or kind look in his eyes, but he recognizes her instantly.
Swiftly, he turns that same gaze to Wei Yenwu.
That's another matter, and a long story.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I see.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: So you did heed my advice to stay at this posthouse.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I have no grounds to distrust the Grand Tutor.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: It has been Messengers, but today the Grand Tutor graces us with a personal visit...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: There is something I must make clear to you, Lord Wei.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Hui-chieh, leave us.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: No need.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Best she stay and hear what I am about to say.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Fine.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The situation in Baizao...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: After Mid-Autumn, His Imperial Majesty granted him leave to enter the Tomb of Sui, to try and quell the threat posed by the bestial one.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: But the day of the full moon nears, and we've heard nothing from the tomb.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: And yet, at this very moment, five Feranmuts have lurked around Great Yan, with intentions unknown.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: The Tianshis of the Chamber of Heaven's Designs along with Yan's finest warriors have stationed themselves near the Feranmuts. Great Yan does not fear the coming battle.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: But the worst outcome we face, is not just fighting five Feranmuts simultaneously.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: No way...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: 'Intentions unknown'—This gray beard sure can talk.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: With the blood feud of the past few millennia, did you think they'd simply show up on your doorstep bearing gifts?
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What... did you say?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I'm sure many are advocating for war at this time.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: There is no opinion from any party left to consider.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I fear Great Yan is left with no other choice.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: The court must have drafted plenty of plans for this contingency.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Countless plans, and none end without a pyrrhic victory.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: But there is still a method yet to be considered.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Tell me, Grand Tutor. Tell me my brother has never conceived of activating Bu Fan himself—
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: He is the True Lung. The True Lung of Yan.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: If the nation is driven to a corner, he is the only one who can do it.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: It's absurd!
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Lord Wei.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: As it stands, there is no longer a need to digress.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Not a single man knew of the secret letter sent to Lungmen until the Imperial Guards set off. And I come today without any attempt to conceal my identity.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I'm sure you understand, Lord Wei.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: The past... stories from forty years ago, thousands of years ago... it should not end like this.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: ...And he should never be the one to pay the price.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: No one wants to see the worst-case scenario, but we cannot deceive ourselves.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I must remind you—even if merely for Yan's sake, or for the good of the realm.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: A backup plan is called for.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Please, just slow down a second.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I don't get it. What does the Grand Tutor mean by a backup plan?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Everything you're saying... what does any of it have to do with Wei Yenwu?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You still don't get it?
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: You don't know what a backup plan is? Something you do when things go south.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: What... are you talking about?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: A kingdom cannot be without its king for even a day. A missing True Lung must naturally see his seat filled by another.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: When father dies, son takes over, and when elder brother leaves, younger returns. That's how it's been for thousands of years.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: And if there's no other choice, this lass will have no choice but to become the True Lung.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice?

attributes.content: What the hell are you talking about?!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: ...Hui-chieh!
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: That voice...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Did the two of you... not hear any of that?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Lord Wei.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I do not expect you to have considered all possible angles already.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: One must think before one acts, but time is short.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: Take care, Lord Wei.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I'll see you out.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: No need.
attributes.name: Grand Tutor

attributes.content: I didn't get any of what he was saying.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: He had me stay to hear it, but I couldn't make sense of it at all.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hui-chieh...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: All that stuff about Yan probably going to war, but he'll give you time to prepare?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Bu Fan, the Feranmuts... what does any of it have to do with you?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hui-chieh.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Many mistakes from the past... Some I made myself, but others I was powerless to stop.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I only insist on ensuring those irrevocable mistakes do not affect the rest of you.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Because I've never doubted in your potential to accomplish more than we ever could.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: This is the worst time you could be saying that.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: One more thing.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Talulah...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Tell me. Was she well, the last time you met?
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: No way. I'm not telling you about her right now.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If you really care, then now is not the time.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Aunt Fumizuki doesn't want you to stay a stubborn old man forever, and she's worried about your safety. And I don't want to—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If you truly care for anyone but yourself, then don't leave them behind.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Tell me, Uncle...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What exactly are you going to do?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: It sounds like she's doing fine. Well, not bad, at least.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: That's not your call to make!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You don't know how much she's sacrificed, and you've no clue what she's—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Enough...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If you want to enjoy your pity party here, then have fun.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I'm going out for some fresh air.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Fine autumn rain continues unabated, like intermittent thoughts left tangled with no end.
I’m sick of you, Wei Yenwu.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You and your precious city.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Where are you headed?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Back up north.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: There are people in the mines who need our help.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: We're running out of time.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Right now?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Then what about this farm? What about the people left here?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Some of our comrades are staying. They'll take care of each other.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: You could join them too, if you're so inclined.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I can't just let you go...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You could follow us instead.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I'd like your help, if it's on the table.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: But—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hui-chieh.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I believe in your words, and your ideals... a place where the Infected are judged fairly... and can live, truly live.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: But that place is not here—not in the past, not in the present.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: The place we seek lies only in the future.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: And must make our way there.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Alright, so on we go... and what next?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Did my past catch up with me... or did I go looking for it? Heh, guess it's less history and more a reality I haven't faced yet.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Talulah, if you were here... what would you think about all these?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hmph. Overcautious and indecisive. Your courage is for naught.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: This lass is unlike her ancestors.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: That first Lung's descendants must number at least tens of thousands over the millennia, how many of them were heroes, and how many were mediocrities?
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: How much can this sliver of that bloodline even accomplish?
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: With a mind this turbid, as if trapped in a dream, can we really trust her with anything?
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: Or is it because those old blockheads refuse to bend? No wonder the youths are too inept to handle things on their own.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: She's been on quite the journey, so she must have other special skills beyond her brute swordplay.
attributes.name: Indistinct Voice

attributes.content: Just who the hell are you?!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Enough hiding!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Come out here and show yourselves!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The vague, mysterious voice speaks again, but she hears it clearly this time.
Only now is Ch'en Hui-chieh sure the whispers that have plagued her all night are no mere hallucination.
Hah, just look at the girl. Inexperienced, yet quick to anger.
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: I'm glad you want to know, but if you truly seek your answer, why not find it yourself—
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: What the...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What was that?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: From the posthouse?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Lady Ch'en.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: What are you all standing around for... did something happen?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: When was the last time you saw Lord Wei?
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: Barely an hour ago.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: So you don't know his whereabouts either.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: Wait, you mean—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Half an hour ago, Lord Wei went to rest and dismissed us.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: The posthouse owner just realized the room was empty when delivering the food.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: We've searched the premises, and found no trace.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: Lord Wei is... missing.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: No note left in the room.
An empty room, as if it never housed a guest.
So he actually managed to slip out, with all of you watching.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Again... yet again, Wei Yenwu.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Lord Wei received a letter, personally penned by the True Lung, summoning him to the capital. We tried in vain to dissuade him. We could only follow.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: Let us tentatively assume he is making his way there.
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: We failed to ensure his safety, and our crime is unforgivable. However, I fear entering the capital now would only—
attributes.name: Shadow Guard

attributes.content: Don't worry.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en interrupts the Shadow Guard.
Whatever the case, he left without a word.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: So this time... I'll find him.
attributes.name: Ch'en
